versions.schema: {"type":"record","name":"VehiclePositionEventData","namespace":"GeneralTransitFeedRealTime.Vehicle","doc":"Realtime positioning information for a transit vehicle. Field contract mirrors the GTFS-Realtime VehiclePosition entity as normalized by the clemensv/real-time-sources GTFS feeder (xreg/gtfs.xreg.json).","fields":[{"name":"trip","doc":"The trip this vehicle is serving. May be absent or partial if the vehicle cannot be matched to a trip instance.","default":null,"type":["null",{"type":"record","name":"TripDescriptor","doc":"Identifies an instance of a GTFS trip, or all instances of a trip along a route.","fields":[{"name":"trip_id","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"trip_id from the GTFS feed this selector refers to."},{"name":"route_id","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"route_id from the GTFS feed this selector refers to."},{"name":"direction_id","type":["null","int"],"default":null,"doc":"Direction of travel (trips.txt direction_id). Experimental."},{"name":"start_time","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"Initially scheduled start time of this trip instance (e.g. 14:19:00)."},{"name":"start_date","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"Scheduled start date of this trip instance in YYYYMMDD format."},{"name":"schedule_relationship","doc":"Relation between this trip and the static schedule.","default":null,"type":["null",{"type":"enum","name":"TripScheduleRelationship","symbols":["SCHEDULED","ADDED","UNSCHEDULED","CANCELED"]}]}]}]},{"name":"vehicle","doc":"Identification of the vehicle performing the trip.","default":null,"type":["null",{"type":"record","name":"VehicleDescriptor","doc":"Identification information for the vehicle performing a trip.","fields":[{"name":"id","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"Internal system identification of the vehicle; unique per vehicle."},{"name":"label","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"User-visible label shown to passengers to identify the vehicle."},{"name":"license_plate","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"The license plate of the vehicle."}]}]},{"name":"position","doc":"Current position of this vehicle.","default":null,"type":["null",{"type":"record","name":"Position","doc":"A geographic position in the WGS-84 coordinate system.","fields":[{"name":"latitude","type":"float","doc":"Degrees North, in the WGS-84 coordinate system."},{"name":"longitude","type":"float","doc":"Degrees East, in the WGS-84 coordinate system."},{"name":"bearing","type":["null","float"],"default":null,"doc":"Bearing in degrees clockwise from North (0 = North, 90 = East)."},{"name":"odometer","type":["null","double"],"default":null,"doc":"Odometer value, in meters."},{"name":"speed","type":["null","float"],"default":null,"doc":"Momentary speed measured by the vehicle, in meters per second."}]}]},{"name":"current_stop_sequence","type":["null","int"],"default":null,"doc":"Stop sequence index of the current stop; meaning is determined by current_status."},{"name":"stop_id","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"Identifies the current stop (matches stops.txt stop_id)."},{"name":"current_status","doc":"Exact status of the vehicle with respect to the current stop. Ignored if current_stop_sequence is missing.","default":null,"type":["null",{"type":"enum","name":"VehicleStopStatus","symbols":["INCOMING_AT","STOPPED_AT","IN_TRANSIT_TO"]}]},{"name":"timestamp","type":["null","long"],"default":null,"doc":"Moment the vehicle position was measured, in POSIX time (seconds since 1970-01-01 UTC)."},{"name":"congestion_level","doc":"Congestion level affecting this vehicle.","default":null,"type":["null",{"type":"enum","name":"CongestionLevel","symbols":["UNKNOWN_CONGESTION_LEVEL","RUNNING_SMOOTHLY","STOP_AND_GO","CONGESTION","SEVERE_CONGESTION"]}]},{"name":"occupancy_status","doc":"Degree of passenger occupancy of the vehicle. Experimental.","default":null,"type":["null",{"type":"enum","name":"OccupancyStatus","symbols":["EMPTY","MANY_SEATS_AVAILABLE","FEW_SEATS_AVAILABLE","STANDING_ROOM_ONLY","CRUSHED_STANDING_ROOM_ONLY","FULL","NOT_ACCEPTING_PASSENGERS"]}]}]}

{"type":"record","name":"VehiclePositionEventData","namespace":"GeneralTransitFeedRealTime.Vehicle","doc":"Realtime positioning information for a transit vehicle. Field contract mirrors the GTFS-Realtime VehiclePosition entity as normalized by the clemensv/real-time-sources GTFS feeder (xreg/gtfs.xreg.json). v2 adds vehicle-level occupancy_percentage and per-carriage multi_carriage_details (both optional, forward-compatible with v1).","fields":[{"name":"trip","doc":"The trip this vehicle is serving. May be absent or partial if the vehicle cannot be matched to a trip instance.","default":null,"type":["null",{"type":"record","name":"TripDescriptor","doc":"Identifies an instance of a GTFS trip, or all instances of a trip along a route.","fields":[{"name":"trip_id","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"trip_id from the GTFS feed this selector refers to."},{"name":"route_id","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"route_id from the GTFS feed this selector refers to."},{"name":"direction_id","type":["null","int"],"default":null,"doc":"Direction of travel (trips.txt direction_id). Experimental."},{"name":"start_time","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"Initially scheduled start time of this trip instance (e.g. 14:19:00)."},{"name":"start_date","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"Scheduled start date of this trip instance in YYYYMMDD format."},{"name":"schedule_relationship","doc":"Relation between this trip and the static schedule.","default":null,"type":["null",{"type":"enum","name":"TripScheduleRelationship","symbols":["SCHEDULED","ADDED","UNSCHEDULED","CANCELED"]}]}]}]},{"name":"vehicle","doc":"Identification of the vehicle performing the trip.","default":null,"type":["null",{"type":"record","name":"VehicleDescriptor","doc":"Identification information for the vehicle performing a trip.","fields":[{"name":"id","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"Internal system identification of the vehicle; unique per vehicle."},{"name":"label","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"User-visible label shown to passengers to identify the vehicle."},{"name":"license_plate","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"The license plate of the vehicle."}]}]},{"name":"position","doc":"Current position of this vehicle.","default":null,"type":["null",{"type":"record","name":"Position","doc":"A geographic position in the WGS-84 coordinate system.","fields":[{"name":"latitude","type":"float","doc":"Degrees North, in the WGS-84 coordinate system."},{"name":"longitude","type":"float","doc":"Degrees East, in the WGS-84 coordinate system."},{"name":"bearing","type":["null","float"],"default":null,"doc":"Bearing in degrees clockwise from North (0 = North, 90 = East)."},{"name":"odometer","type":["null","double"],"default":null,"doc":"Odometer value, in meters."},{"name":"speed","type":["null","float"],"default":null,"doc":"Momentary speed measured by the vehicle, in meters per second."}]}]},{"name":"current_stop_sequence","type":["null","int"],"default":null,"doc":"Stop sequence index of the current stop; meaning is determined by current_status."},{"name":"stop_id","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"Identifies the current stop (matches stops.txt stop_id)."},{"name":"current_status","doc":"Exact status of the vehicle with respect to the current stop. Ignored if current_stop_sequence is missing.","default":null,"type":["null",{"type":"enum","name":"VehicleStopStatus","symbols":["INCOMING_AT","STOPPED_AT","IN_TRANSIT_TO"]}]},{"name":"timestamp","type":["null","long"],"default":null,"doc":"Moment the vehicle position was measured, in POSIX time (seconds since 1970-01-01 UTC)."},{"name":"congestion_level","doc":"Congestion level affecting this vehicle.","default":null,"type":["null",{"type":"enum","name":"CongestionLevel","symbols":["UNKNOWN_CONGESTION_LEVEL","RUNNING_SMOOTHLY","STOP_AND_GO","CONGESTION","SEVERE_CONGESTION"]}]},{"name":"occupancy_status","doc":"Degree of passenger occupancy of the vehicle. Experimental.","default":null,"type":["null",{"type":"enum","name":"OccupancyStatus","symbols":["EMPTY","MANY_SEATS_AVAILABLE","FEW_SEATS_AVAILABLE","STANDING_ROOM_ONLY","CRUSHED_STANDING_ROOM_ONLY","FULL","NOT_ACCEPTING_PASSENGERS"]}]},{"name":"occupancy_percentage","type":["null","int"],"default":null,"doc":"Percentage of vehicle occupancy (0-100+, may exceed 100 when crush-loaded). Added in v2."},{"name":"multi_carriage_details","doc":"Per-carriage occupancy and identity for multi-carriage vehicles (e.g. trains). Added in v2.","default":null,"type":["null",{"type":"array","items":{"type":"record","name":"CarriageDetails","doc":"Occupancy and identity details for a single carriage of a multi-carriage vehicle.","fields":[{"name":"id","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"Internal identification of the carriage."},{"name":"label","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"User-visible label of the carriage shown to passengers."},{"name":"occupancy_status","type":["null","OccupancyStatus"],"default":null,"doc":"Degree of passenger occupancy of this carriage."},{"name":"occupancy_percentage","type":["null","int"],"default":null,"doc":"Percentage of occupancy in this carriage (0-100+)."},{"name":"carriage_sequence","type":["null","int"],"default":null,"doc":"Order of this carriage relative to others in the vehicle (1-based)."}]}}]}]}

{"type":"record","name":"TripUpdateEventData","namespace":"GeneralTransitFeedRealTime.Trip","doc":"Realtime update of the progress of a vehicle along a trip. Field contract mirrors the GTFS-Realtime TripUpdate entity as normalized by the clemensv/real-time-sources GTFS feeder (xreg/gtfs.xreg.json).","fields":[{"name":"trip","doc":"The trip this message applies to. Required. At most one TripUpdate exists per trip instance.","type":{"type":"record","name":"TripDescriptor","doc":"Identifies an instance of a GTFS trip, or all instances of a trip along a route.","fields":[{"name":"trip_id","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"trip_id from the GTFS feed this selector refers to."},{"name":"route_id","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"route_id from the GTFS feed this selector refers to."},{"name":"direction_id","type":["null","int"],"default":null,"doc":"Direction of travel (trips.txt direction_id). Experimental."},{"name":"start_time","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"Initially scheduled start time of this trip instance (e.g. 14:19:00)."},{"name":"start_date","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"Scheduled start date of this trip instance in YYYYMMDD format."},{"name":"schedule_relationship","doc":"Relation between this trip and the static schedule.","default":null,"type":["null",{"type":"enum","name":"TripScheduleRelationship","symbols":["SCHEDULED","ADDED","UNSCHEDULED","CANCELED"]}]}]}},{"name":"vehicle","doc":"Additional information on the vehicle serving this trip.","default":null,"type":["null",{"type":"record","name":"VehicleDescriptor","doc":"Identification information for the vehicle performing a trip.","fields":[{"name":"id","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"Internal system identification of the vehicle; unique per vehicle."},{"name":"label","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"User-visible label shown to passengers to identify the vehicle."},{"name":"license_plate","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"The license plate of the vehicle."}]}]},{"name":"stop_time_update","doc":"Updates to StopTimes for the trip, sorted by stop_sequence. Required.","type":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"record","name":"StopTimeUpdate","doc":"Realtime update for arrival and/or departure at a single stop.","fields":[{"name":"stop_sequence","type":["null","int"],"default":null,"doc":"Order of this stop for the trip (matches stop_times.txt stop_sequence)."},{"name":"stop_id","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"Identifies the serviced stop (matches stops.txt stop_id)."},{"name":"arrival","doc":"Predicted arrival event at the stop.","default":null,"type":["null",{"type":"record","name":"StopTimeEvent","doc":"Timing information for a single predicted event (arrival or departure).","fields":[{"name":"delay","type":["null","int"],"default":null,"doc":"Delay in seconds from the scheduled time; positive = late, negative = early."},{"name":"time","type":["null","long"],"default":null,"doc":"Event time as POSIX time (seconds since 1970-01-01 UTC)."},{"name":"uncertainty","type":["null","int"],"default":null,"doc":"Uncertainty of the prediction in seconds; 0 means fully certain."}]}]},{"name":"departure","doc":"Predicted departure event at the stop.","default":null,"type":["null","StopTimeEvent"]},{"name":"schedule_relationship","doc":"Relation of this stop to the static schedule.","default":null,"type":["null",{"type":"enum","name":"StopTimeScheduleRelationship","symbols":["SCHEDULED","SKIPPED","NO_DATA","UNSCHEDULED"]}]}]}}},{"name":"timestamp","type":["null","long"],"default":null,"doc":"Moment the trip's realtime progress was measured, in POSIX time."},{"name":"delay","type":["null","int"],"default":null,"doc":"Current schedule deviation for the trip in seconds; positive = late, negative = early. Experimental."}]}

{"type":"record","name":"AlertEventData","namespace":"GeneralTransitFeedRealTime.Alert","doc":"An alert indicating an incident in the public transit network. Field contract mirrors the GTFS-Realtime Alert entity as normalized by the clemensv/real-time-sources GTFS feeder (xreg/gtfs.xreg.json).","fields":[{"name":"active_period","doc":"Time ranges when the alert should be shown. Required. If multiple ranges are given, the alert is shown during all of them.","type":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"record","name":"TimeRange","doc":"A time range in POSIX time; open-ended when start or end is omitted.","fields":[{"name":"start","type":["null","long"],"default":null,"doc":"Start of the range as POSIX time; if missing, the range is open-ended in the past."},{"name":"end","type":["null","long"],"default":null,"doc":"End of the range as POSIX time; if missing, the range is open-ended in the future."}]}}},{"name":"informed_entity","doc":"Entities whose users should be notified of this alert. Required.","type":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"record","name":"EntitySelector","doc":"A selector for an entity affected by an alert.","fields":[{"name":"agency_id","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"Identifies the affected agency."},{"name":"route_id","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"Identifies the affected route."},{"name":"route_type","type":["null","int"],"default":null,"doc":"Identifies the affected route type (GTFS route_type)."},{"name":"trip","doc":"Identifies the affected trip.","default":null,"type":["null",{"type":"record","name":"TripDescriptor","doc":"Identifies an instance of a GTFS trip, or all instances of a trip along a route.","fields":[{"name":"trip_id","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"trip_id from the GTFS feed this selector refers to."},{"name":"route_id","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"route_id from the GTFS feed this selector refers to."},{"name":"direction_id","type":["null","int"],"default":null,"doc":"Direction of travel (trips.txt direction_id). Experimental."},{"name":"start_time","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"Initially scheduled start time of this trip instance."},{"name":"start_date","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"Scheduled start date of this trip instance in YYYYMMDD format."},{"name":"schedule_relationship","doc":"Relation between this trip and the static schedule.","default":null,"type":["null",{"type":"enum","name":"TripScheduleRelationship","symbols":["SCHEDULED","ADDED","UNSCHEDULED","CANCELED"]}]}]}]},{"name":"stop_id","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"Identifies the affected stop."}]}}},{"name":"cause","doc":"Cause of this alert.","default":null,"type":["null",{"type":"enum","name":"AlertCause","symbols":["UNKNOWN_CAUSE","OTHER_CAUSE","TECHNICAL_PROBLEM","STRIKE","DEMONSTRATION","ACCIDENT","HOLIDAY","WEATHER","MAINTENANCE","CONSTRUCTION","POLICE_ACTIVITY","MEDICAL_EMERGENCY"]}]},{"name":"effect","doc":"What effect this problem has on the affected entity.","default":null,"type":["null",{"type":"enum","name":"AlertEffect","symbols":["NO_SERVICE","REDUCED_SERVICE","SIGNIFICANT_DELAYS","DETOUR","ADDITIONAL_SERVICE","MODIFIED_SERVICE","OTHER_EFFECT","UNKNOWN_EFFECT","STOP_MOVED"]}]},{"name":"url","doc":"URL providing additional information about the alert.","default":null,"type":["null",{"type":"record","name":"TranslatedString","doc":"An internationalized message containing per-language versions of a snippet of text or a URL.","fields":[{"name":"translation","doc":"At least one translation must be provided.","type":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"record","name":"Translation","doc":"A single language-specific translation.","fields":[{"name":"text","type":"string","doc":"The translated string in the given language."},{"name":"language","type":["null","string"],"default":null,"doc":"BCP-47 language code; omitted for a language-agnostic default."}]}}}]}]},{"name":"header_text","doc":"Short summary of the alert as plain text.","default":null,"type":["null","TranslatedString"]},{"name":"description_text","doc":"Full description of the alert as plain text; adds to the header information.","default":null,"type":["null","TranslatedString"]}]}
